endpoints.name: GET /v2/PhoneNumbers/{PhoneNumber}
endpoints.description: Fetch the Inbound Processing Region assigned to a phone number.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{PHONENUMBER}} with a real phonenumber.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/PhoneNumbers/{PhoneNumber}
endpoints.description: Assign an Inbound Processing Region to a phone number.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{PHONENUMBER}} with a real phonenumber.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/SipDomains/{SipDomain}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SIPDOMAIN}} with a real sipdomain.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/SipDomains/{SipDomain}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SIPDOMAIN}} with a real sipdomain.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/Trunks/{SipTrunkDomain}
endpoints.description: Fetch the Inbound Processing Region assigned to a SIP Trunk.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SIPTRUNKDOMAIN}} with a real siptrunkdomain.

endpoints.name: POST /v2/Trunks/{SipTrunkDomain}
endpoints.description: Assign an Inbound Processing Region to a SIP Trunk
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SIPTRUNKDOMAIN}} with a real siptrunkdomain.
